A.text: dissolves and mixes with the gas

B.text: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside

C.text: is pulled inward toward the center

D.text: ruptures, allowing the gas to escape freely

parsed.answer_value: expands as well but remains intact, keeping the gas inside
parsed.rationale: The outer shell remains intact and expands as the red internal gas expands, indicating that the shell is not dissolving or rupturing but is accommodating the internal expansion while maintaining its structure.
